data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence regarding the deterministic conflict prevention requirement.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not confirm the implementation of the necessary mechanisms for deterministic conflict prevention when queue and slot channels compete for the same resource. While the linked use case outlines the need for such a mechanism, it lacks concrete evidence of its existence or functionality, leading to a blocked status. The prior steps do not provide any direct validation of this requirement, indicating a gap in the evidence needed to assess compliance.
gaps: No evidence of deterministic conflict prevention implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
